description_long: This nightstand features a rectangular wooden top with a rich, medium-brown finish, supported by a geometric black metal frame. The tabletop is flat and unadorned, providing a clean and modern aesthetic. The legs are constructed from slender, square metal tubing, forming open rectangular shapes that give the piece a light and airy appearance. There are no visible drawers, handles, or decorative elements, emphasizing a minimalist, industrial style. The structure appears sturdy, with the metal frame providing strong support for the wooden surface. This design is well-suited for contemporary urban environments, such as lofts or modern apartments.
description: A minimalist nightstand with a rectangular wooden top and open black metal frame legs, featuring a clean, industrial design with no visible drawers or ornamentation.
description_view_0: The nightstand is seen from the narrow end, highlighting the thickness of the wooden top and the depth of the frame.
description_view_1: A full frontal view shows the wide wooden surface and the symmetrical, open rectangular metal legs.
description_view_2: The opposite narrow end mirrors view 0, again emphasizing the depth and the open frame structure.
description_view_3: Another frontal view, identical to view 1, displaying the broad tabletop and geometric metal legs.
attribute_leg_design: open rectangular black metal frame legs
attribute_placement_relative_to_other_ur: against a wall or beside other furniture
